hotel_name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Nashville Downtown

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: No working heat in the middle of the winter.   Room was freezing, others complained too.  They kept saying that the tech fixed it, but that was not the case.

reviews.title: Great location but the room was 72 degrees because the  air conditioner did not work
reviews.negatives: It was 72 degrees because the air conditioning did not work so staff brought a small fan but that did not help. Me and my wife sweat threw the night

reviews.title: Park issues
reviews.text: Had challenges with parking they took our keys and went on break we waited more than 40 mins to get the Keys .. it was absolute waste of our time .
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds Junior Suite with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Will never stay again!
reviews.positives: No fitted sheet on bed, musty smell, and terrible service in the restaurant!
reviews.negatives: No fitted sheet on bed, misty smell, and terrible service in restaurant!

reviews.title: Good hotel close to the action
reviews.text: We went here for the Jets Titans game and partied all weekend. This hotel is located 3 blocks from Broadway, aka the honky tonk highway. Good location, nice hotel. The indoor pool was being renovated so after my workout I couldn't swim. Starbucks in the lobby too.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The only issue was the bed. It was extremely difficult to sleep on. The cover that was added to the mattress wasn't comfortable.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.positives: Location of hotel was near activites and comfortable beds.
reviews.negatives: Room was so small, cleaning staff didn't clean room or refresh room for 2 days. When I called for fresh towels, cleaning staff brought me 2 days worth of all towels out of spite and didn't take the used towels. Bathroom too small and can only hold 1 day use of towels, so had to pile towels outside of bathroom.

reviews.title: Weekend stay
reviews.text: The staff was great. Room and property could have been a bit cleaner (dusty in places) and I wish the property had a pool, but the breakfast was great and the room was quiet and the hotel is in a great location!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
On 7.26.2024 there were COCKROACHES in our room the size of small mice. We requested a refund and were told to submit a bad review through booking.com AND that there was nothing they could do. Pictures attached. 
We were not offered a new room, they offered us a free drink at the bar which is not nearly enough. We will not book with this site or stay with Hilton again.

reviews.title: Not bad, but if you spend over $500 a night, the parking should be free and the toilet should work!
reviews.text: Friendly staff that comped the parking after I told them about the lone toilet in our room that didn’t work properly. In the end, the room was kind of overpriced.
reviews.room_type: 1 King Bed 2 Room Suite With Sofa Bed

reviews.title: It Sucked. I paid with booking.com first. Then my husband went in And they charged him again
reviews.negatives: They charged me AGAIN for the room! 350.00 p/nite . Said that Booking would refund my original reservation confirmation amount

reviews.title: Great location!!
reviews.text: It was at a great location (walking distance from Broadway)! Friendly staff and a clean room! I would stay there again!

reviews.title: 観光
reviews.text: ホテルでバスツアーの予約をとってくれて助かりました。

reviews.title: Very disappointed. Not the Hilton we know and love!
reviews.positives: Fabian at the front desk was very nice and apologetic with everything happening.
reviews.negatives: There was a group of about 900 preteens/teens while we were there. They were loud, disrespectful and unsupervised. They ran the halls, the elevators and pretty much the entire hotel. They couldn't even have the "live music" in the bar/restaurant because you couldn't hear it over all the kids. Terrible experience for what we had to pay for.

reviews.title: Will never stay there again
reviews.positives: Parking was a joke. $36  a day for park across the street or $55 for valet

reviews.title: Will not come back. Will go to a friendlier hotel next time.
reviews.negatives: Front desk staff was not friendly. They made us feel like an inconvenience and bother.

reviews.title: Location good but that’s absolutely it!
reviews.negatives: They ran out of water, the bar was way understaffed food was hot and miss usually too a long time the act was terrible in the rooms no ice machines worked and we covered in mold… costs and extra $55 a day to park plus an extra $25 a day or who knows… once you check in you’re told about this additional $75 a night fee.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Waited over an hour for valet to bring our car around.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The price does not match the way the room looks. It’s ran down! It’s crazy there’s no free parking.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: No ac and the rooms smelled awful

reviews.title: Just what we were looking for...
reviews.positives: Location is close enough to walk to downtown Nashville attractions.  Hotel staff was friendly and helpful and parking using the valet service was easy.
reviews.negatives: Walking back up the hill to the hotel after visiting the attractions downtown.

reviews.title: Enjoyed my stay
reviews.positives: Great hotel, very clean and comfortable. Would recommend.

reviews.title: We were there for the SEC Tournament, nightlife was good but enjoyed Pete’s dueling piano bar
reviews.positives: The breakfast was great both off the buffet and the menu

reviews.title: Too much humidity in room
reviews.positives: Location was great and lobby area plus having Starbucks. BUT room was so humid! I sweated and not that comfortable. I expected more from doubletree.
reviews.negatives: Room temperature was humid all the time. Weird!
